describe_table._note: Server returns Python repr string (not JSON). Response is str encoding of list[{cid, name, type, notnull, dflt_value, pk}]. No JSON-deserializable dict to unwrap.

list_tables._note: Server returns Python repr string (not JSON). Response is str encoding of list[{name: str}]. No JSON-deserializable dict to unwrap.

read_query._note: Server returns Python repr string (not JSON). Query result schema varies by query. No static TypedDict possible. Stays Any/str.
